resources.string: Congratulations! You have successfully connected to the Bluetooth Quick Start sample on nRF54L15 DK.
Press BTN 0 on the DK to send a notification to the app. Observe the state changing from RELEASED to PRESSED below.
Use the switch below to toggle the LED 0 on the DK.
Press BTN 1 on the DK to simulate a firmware fault. The core dump will be uploaded to nRF Cloud on the following connection.
